# 🐣 Incubator

**The Automated CI/CD Hatchery for Custom Linux ISOs.**

![Go Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Go-1.21+-00ADD8?style=flat&logo=go)
![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Proxmox%20VE-E57000?style=flat&logo=proxmox)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue)

**Incubator** is a high-performance, zero-dependency orchestration tool written in Go. It is designed to automatically deploy, install, and rigorously test Linux ISOs generated by [penguins-eggs](https://github.com/pieroproietti/penguins-eggs). 

By leveraging **Proxmox VE** and the **QEMU Guest Agent**, Incubator acts as a ruthless QA inspector: it boots the live ISO, executes a fully unattended bare-metal installation (`krill`), reboots, and extracts system telemetry to verify the integrity of the newly minted OS—all without human intervention.

## 🏗️ Architecture: Why Go?

Originally written in Bash, the Incubator was rewritten in Go to overcome the physical limitations of sequential shell scripts in heavy virtualization environments. 

* **The Worker Pool (Semaphore Pattern):** Incubator uses Go routines to test multiple ISOs concurrently. It keeps your Proxmox host at 100% efficiency without overloading the I/O, safely queuing tasks and managing hardware limits.
* **Zero Dependencies:** A single compiled binary. No need to manage Python virtual environments, Node.js modules, or complex dependencies on your self-hosted runner. Drop it in and run.

## ✨ Key Features

* ⚡ **Concurrent Hatching:** Test Ubuntu, Arch, Fedora, and Alpine derivatives simultaneously.
* 🛡️ **Bulletproof Execution:** Communicates exclusively via QEMU Guest Agent. Includes advanced anti-hang countermeasures (the "Ghost Finger" and "Guillotine" fallbacks) to prevent zombie VMs.
* 🧩 **Universal Bootloader Support:** Validates complex boot topologies, including UEFI/BIOS, Btrfs root partitions, and strict SELinux auto-relabeling workflows.
* 📊 **Automated Telemetry:** Dynamically extracts `fstab` and `fastfetch`/`neofetch` reports directly from the installed disk to prove the OS is stable and ready for production.
* 🐙 **Native GitHub Actions Integration:** Designed to run flawlessly on self-hosted runners, emitting grouped, scannable CI logs.

## 🚀 Quick Start

### Prerequisites
1. A **Proxmox VE** host (`qm` command line accessible).
2. ISOs generated by `penguins-eggs` ready in your storage.

### Installation
Clone the repository and build the binary (requires Go 1.21+):

```bash
git clone [https://github.com/pieroproietti/incubator.git](https://github.com/pieroproietti/incubator.git)
cd incubator
go build -o incubator main.go
